brand.name: TREVISOFT

projects.name: VinylPNG
projects.summary: Create cinematic vinyl visuals, cover mockups, and animated record videos from your artwork.
projects.description: Export scroll-stopping PNGs and reel-ready video assets for TikTok, Instagram, music launches, and promo drops.

projects.name: PixBatch
projects.summary: Convert HEIC, TIFF, PNG, JPG, AVIF, and WEBP images in bulk.
projects.description: A private browser-based image converter with local processing, quality controls, and resize settings.

projects.name: DropHunter
projects.summary: Track and farm Twitch Drops with less manual tab juggling.
projects.description: Queue campaigns, monitor reward progress, open eligible streams, and auto-claim rewards when Twitch marks them ready. Store review in progress.

secondaryAction.label: Store Pending
secondaryAction.disabledReason: DropHunter is in Chrome Web Store review and will be available soon.

projects.name: ARC Raiders Build Planner
projects.summary: Plan ARC Raiders skill trees for Conditioning, Mobility, and Survival.
projects.description: Test point allocations, compare builds, and share a focused Raider setup before heading topside.
